first_session_work_unit: Iter R3: #3 PhotoDNA hash integration. The current CSAM_HASH_MATCH path in lib/image-moderation.ts uses a sha256-of-raw-bytes placeholder (collides only on byte-identical files). Real PhotoDNA needs Microsoft's NDA + Azure approval — scaffold the hash-lookup abstraction so a real provider drops in later; for dev use a perceptual hash like pHash (npm: sharp-phash or imghash) seeded against a tiny demo blocklist file. Add unit tests for hash → match-or-no-match. Composition: this is the OTHER half of the CSAM-detection path (classifier already shipped in handoff baseline; hash-match wires up the faster pre-classifier short-circuit).
